languages.text: "Эоганн, твои эксперименты действительно опасны. Впредь ты не смеешь выносить их за пределы лаборатории".
"Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, твои эксперименты действительно опасны. Впредь ты не смеешь выносить их за пределы лаборатории".

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."
"Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."
"Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."
"Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."
"Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."
"Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."

languages.text: "Eogunn, Eure Experimente sind in der Tat gefährlich. Deshalb werdet Ihr sie außerhalb des Labors nicht fortführen."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, Eure Experimente sind in der Tat gefährlich. Deshalb werdet Ihr sie außerhalb des Labors nicht fortführen."

languages.text: « Eogunn, vos expériences sont indéniablement dangereuses. À dater de cet instant, je vous interdis donc de les mener en dehors du laboratoire. »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, vos expériences sont indéniablement dangereuses. À dater de cet instant, je vous interdis donc de les mener en dehors du laboratoire. »

languages.text: “伊奥贡，你的实验的确很危险。从今往后，严禁你在实验室外进行实验。”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，你的实验的确很危险。从今往后，严禁你在实验室外进行实验。”

languages.text: «Eogunn, sus experimentos son, efectivamente, peligrosos. Desde ahora, se abstendrá de realizarlos fuera del laboratorio».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, sus experimentos son, efectivamente, peligrosos. Desde ahora, se abstendrá de realizarlos fuera del laboratorio».

languages.text: 「エオガン、君の実験は実に危険だ。今後、実験室の外では実験を行ってはならない」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."

traits.locale_text: 「エオガン、君の実験は実に危険だ。今後、実験室の外では実験を行ってはならない」

languages.text: "Eogunn, deneylerin gerçekten de tehlikeli. Bundan böyle bunları laboratuvar dışında yürütmeyeceksin."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, deneylerin gerçekten de tehlikeli. Bundan böyle bunları laboratuvar dışında yürütmeyeceksin."
